messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0054",
  "title": "皇室战争",
  "page_index": 17,
  "page_range": "17"
}

Section text:
## 皇室战争

Clash Royale

Supercell作为一家传奇的移动游戏开发商，其近年来的部分新品虽成绩不尽理想，但多款老产品焕发的“第二春”再次展现了其深厚的运营功力。继去年《荒野乱斗》通过商业化重做与英雄产出调整实现流水翻倍后，今年《皇室战争》的高位上榜，则是玩法创新与产出优化双轮驱动的结果。其核心在于进行了一场“系统性重生”：

一方面，游戏大幅提升了皇室征程（奖杯之路）的上限并引入全新高阶模式，彻底解决了老玩家缺乏长期目标的痛点，重构了进度追求生态；

另一方面，创新推出的“合成奇兵”模式，将自走棋的合成策略与IP角色结合，以低门槛、快节奏的新体验成功破圈，吸引了大量新老用户。

同时，游戏对经济系统进行了普惠性调整，将更多高级奖励下沉至广大中层玩家可触及的活动中，显著提升了整体的参与感与付费意愿。这套组合拳精准地激活了用户生态，让一款运营多年的产品重获增长动能。

2023-2025年《皇室战争》海外收入规模（亿元）

![](../images/16/133_1092_1189_1380_image.jpg)
[image_caption]
这是一张柱状图，展示了2023年、2024年和2025年的数据对比。图表中有三个蓝色的柱子，分别对应这三个年份。2023年的值约为22，2024年的值约为22，2025年的值约为45。在2024年和2025年之间有一个红色的箭头，标注了94.8%的增长率。
[/image_caption]

来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制

message.content:
**Topics:** Mobile game lifecycle management, legacy title revitalization, gameplay innovation, in-game economic system optimization, overseas revenue performance.
**Entities:** Supercell (developer), 《皇室战争》/Clash Royale (primary subject), 《荒野乱斗》/Brawl Stars (comparative reference), 点点数据 (data provider).
**Dates/Timeframes:** 2023, 2024, 2025 (revenue tracking period); contextual references to "last year" and "this year" for update rollouts.
**Definitions/Concepts:** “系统性重生” (core revitalization framework); 皇室征程/奖杯之路 (player progression/trophy system); “合成奇兵”模式 (new Auto Chess-style synthesis gameplay); 经济系统普惠性调整 (reward distribution strategy targeting mid-tier players).
**Procedures/Strategies:** Increasing trophy road caps and introducing high-tier progression modes; launching low-barrier, fast-paced synthesis gameplay; redistributing premium rewards to accessible mid-tier activities to boost engagement and monetization.
**Claims:** Supercell’s operational expertise successfully revitalized legacy products; Clash Royale’s recent growth is driven by dual factors of gameplay innovation and economic optimization; these updates resolved veteran progression stagnation, attracted new/returning users, and increased overall paying willingness.
**Metrics & Figures:** Bar chart tracking overseas revenue (单位：亿元): 2023 (~22), 2024 (~22), 2025 (~45); highlights a 94.8% year-over-year growth rate from 2024 to 2025.
**Evidence Types:** Analytical industry commentary, quantitative market data visualization, third-party research citation (点点数据自主研究及绘制).

**Procedures/Strategies:** Increasing trophy road caps and introducing high-tier progression modes; launching low-barrier, fast-paced synthesis gameplay; redistributing premium rewards to accessible mid-tier activities to boost engagement and monetization.
**Claims:** Supercell’s operational expertise successfully revitalized legacy products; Clash Royale’s recent growth is driven by dual factors of gameplay innovation and economic optimization; these updates resolved veteran progression stagnation, attracted new/returning users, and increased overall paying willingness.
**Metrics & Figures:** Bar chart tracking overseas revenue (单位：亿元): 2023 (~22), 2024 (~22), 2025 (~45); highlights a 94.8% year-over-year growth rate from 2024 to 2025.
**Evidence Types:** Analytical industry commentary, quantitative market data visualization, third-party research citation (点点数据自主研究及绘制).
